mapper.select: SELECT ep.eval_year AS year, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierSCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierACount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierBCount, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(qe.grade, e.employee_tier) = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tierCCount FROM ( SELECT eval_period_id, eval_year, eval_sequence FROM evaluation_period WHERE eval_year <= #{year} ORDER BY eval_year DESC, eval_sequence DESC LIMIT 6 ) ep JOIN employee e ON e.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.employee_tier IN ('S', 'A', 'B', 'C') LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id AND qe.evaluatee_id = e.employee_id AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 GROUP BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence ORDER BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence
